payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: Partial white ceramic sink basin with visible rim and interior set into a beige/tan countertop; a small portion of metallic faucet hardware is visible at the rear and the right side of the sink is cut off by the crop; approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.
